site.name: Mathieu Châles — Portfolio
site.description: Portfolio of Mathieu Châles, junior fullstack developer based in Paris. Career-switcher from woodworking, graduating from La Capsule. Looking for a full-time role or internship.

profile.bioIntro: Yesterday I was shaping wood. Today I write code.
profile.bioTagline: Always to build things that serve a purpose.
bioParagraphs: **Mechanical engineer** by training, I coordinated **international science programmes** before switching careers through the **La Capsule** fullstack bootcamp (2026).
I code in **TypeScript** — **React / Next.js** on the web, **React Native** on mobile, **Node.js** on the server. Looking for a **full-time role or internship** in the **Paris area** (hybrid).

formation.heading: Education
formation.bootcampName: RNCP Level 6 — Fullstack Web & Mobile Developer
formation.description: Intensive fullstack web and mobile development training. Real projects, teamwork, professional pace.
formation.stack: React · Next.js · React Native · Node.js · Express · MongoDB · TypeScript · Git
formation.engineeringDescription: Multidisciplinary programme focused on mechanics, production and industrial logistics. Completed in work-study at Renault — optimising test protocols, coordinating between technical teams and cross-functional departments.

autonomous.label: Autonomous
autonomous.tooltip: Project built entirely without AI assistance.

assisted.label: AI as a tool
assisted.tooltip: Project built independently, using Claude Code in learning mode as a guide.

supervised.label: Supervised by me
supervised.tooltip: Project generated with Claude Code under my direct supervision.

alterago.title: AlterAgo
alterago.description: A mobile gamification app designed to help seniors stay motivated through daily challenges and a progression system. MVP project built in 2 weeks as a team of 3, validating the RNCP Level 6 fullstack degree.
alterago.roleDetail: As tech lead, I owned the full authentication and onboarding flow: integrating Clerk for account management (sign up, login, password reset), building the user profile creation with native camera access, and storing avatars on Cloudinary through the backend API. Every step of the user journey — from registration to first use — was designed and implemented end to end.

picswipe.title: PicSwipe
picswipe.description:
An Android mobile app to quickly sort your photo gallery using swipe gestures — right to keep, left to delete.
Solo project, built from scratch: native gallery access with permission handling, smooth animations with Reanimated 4 and Gesture Handler, global state management with Zustand, session persistence with AsyncStorage, and haptic feedback for a polished tactile experience. Photos are loaded progressively by month, and a review screen lets you confirm deletions before permanently freeing up storage.

drg-dashboard.title: DRG Dashboard
drg-dashboard.description: A fullstack learning project built around reverse engineering: parsing the binary save files (GVAS / Unreal Engine 4 format) of the game Deep Rock Galactic to extract player statistics and display them in a web dashboard. The core is a Python parser built from scratch, decoding an undocumented binary format structure by structure — like building a translator for a language with no dictionary.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.pitch: I'm looking for a full-time role or an internship in the Paris area (hybrid). If you have a junior position, a mission, or just want to chat about a project — drop me a line.
